title: Work and jobs
explanation:
Work and jobs

  • teacher, doctor, engineer, nurse, chef
  • office, hospital, restaurant, factory
  • colleague, boss, salary, meeting
  • Verbs: work, start, finish, earn

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: A person who teaches students is a ____. | *teacher | doctor | chef
She works in a hospital. She's a ____. | *nurse | engineer | boss
My ____ is very friendly — we have lunch together. | *colleague | salary | meeting
He ____ at nine and finishes at five. | *starts | earns | salary

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option to complete these sentences. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: My sister is a ____. She helps sick people. | doctor
I have a ____ at ten o'clock. | meeting
He works in an ____ in the city centre. | office
She got a new ____ last month. | job

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: An ____ builds bridges and machines. | *engineer | nurse | chef
The ____ pays employees every month. | *company | colleague | meeting
What do you ____ for a living? | *do | earn | boss
He wants a better ____. | *job | work | meeting
